title: Cloud alert received
message: INC-2026-00431 reports VM instance unhealthy / failed status check on CLOUD-VM-WEB-03.

payload.alert_type: VM instance unhealthy / failed status check
payload.current_state: VM WEB-03 failed instance health checks for 9 minutes; load balancer has 1 unhealthy backend.
payload.requested_outcome: Recover VM health or fail over without deleting the instance.

title: SOP retrieved
message: Check load balancer health, avoid terminate-first response, restart or fail over safely, and validate health checks.

payload.title: Cloud VM Health Recovery
controls: Confirm load balancer has healthy capacity before action.
Do not terminate the VM as first response.
Require approval for restart or failover.
Validate instance and service health checks.

title: Historical tickets compared
message: 5 similar tickets found; 1 unsafe precedent flagged.

items.summary: Drained and restarted unhealthy VM after capacity check.
Failed traffic to healthy backend before restart.
Reattached instance after health check validation.
Engineer terminated the VM before collecting diagnostics.
items.notes: Unsafe precedent: diagnostic evidence was lost and capacity dropped.

items.summary: Restart did not recover instance due to host degradation.

title: SOP beats history
message: Unsafe history terminated the VM first; SOP requires drain, diagnostic preservation, and restart/failover.

blocked_precedent.summary: Engineer terminated the VM before collecting diagnostics.
blocked_precedent.notes: Unsafe precedent: diagnostic evidence was lost and capacity dropped.

title: Evidence summary structured
message: Proceed with SOP-governed mock remediation for VM instance unhealthy / failed status check.

payload.outcome: Proceed with SOP-governed mock remediation for VM instance unhealthy / failed status check.
sop_controls: Confirm load balancer has healthy capacity before action.
Do not terminate the VM as first response.
Require approval for restart or failover.
Validate instance and service health checks.
payload.governance_note: SOP beats history: HIST-CLD-2026-009 is visible as a warning, not copied into the remediation plan.

title: Safe remediation plan generated
message: Restart the unhealthy VM in mock mode while keeping load balancer failover active.

payload.summary: Restart the unhealthy VM in mock mode while keeping load balancer failover active.
payload.action_preview: Mock action: drain WEB-03 from load balancer, restart instance, reattach after health checks pass.
payload.estimated_effect: Unhealthy backend count moves from 1 to 0 and service health checks pass.
safeguards: Human approval is required before remediation.
SOP controls override unsafe historical precedent.
payload.escalation_condition: Escalate to cloud engineering if VM fails health checks after restart.

title: Policy gate passed with approval hold
message: Policy allows planning but requires human approval before mock execution.

checks.name: Target scope
checks.message: Targets are limited to approved scenario resources.

checks.name: Dry-run guard
checks.message: Plan uses a dry-run or mock-only action preview.

checks.name: Human approval
checks.message: Human approval is required before remediation.

checks.name: Mock-only execution
checks.message: Plan is constrained to mock execution.

title: Approval package structured
message: Approve mock-only remediation for VM instance unhealthy / failed status check.

payload.operator_message: Approve mock-only remediation for VM instance unhealthy / failed status check.
payload.expected_safe_effect: Unhealthy backend count moves from 1 to 0 and service health checks pass.

title: Human approval required
message: Operator review is required before mock remediation can continue.

payload.side_effects: Replay mode disables approval side effects.

title: Mock remediation executed
message: Mock cloud recovery drained, restarted, and reattached the VM after health checks passed.

title: Scenario validation passed
message: VM health moved from failed to passed and unhealthy load balancer backends dropped to 0.

payload.name: Scenario validation
payload.message: VM health moved from failed to passed and unhealthy load balancer backends dropped to 0.

title: RCA and audit evidence generated
message: The cloud VM failed instance status checks while other backend capacity remained available.

payload.root_cause: The cloud VM failed instance status checks while other backend capacity remained available.
payload.validation: VM health moved from failed to passed and unhealthy load balancer backends dropped to 0.
payload.business_impact: Customer Portal remained protected during the synthetic workflow.

title: Closure decision required
message: Remediation is validated. Operator can close the incident now or keep it under observation before closure.

options.label: Approve closure
options.message: Close the incident with RCA and audit evidence attached.

options.label: Observe first
options.message: Keep the incident under observation, recheck metrics, then close.

title: Incident closed
message: INC-2026-00431 was closed with RCA, evidence, and validation attached.
